Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and skills for employment (Target 4.4) by fostering cultural understanding and communication for work.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Prepares students for decent work (Target 8.5) by analyzing 'troubles experienced by foreigners working in Japanese companies' and understanding 'Japanese business customs'.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Develops skills for conflict resolution and inclusive participation (Target 16.7) by discussing 'troubles and conflicts' and learning to 'accurately express' opinions.
